evals.name: new-feature-zh-mixed
evals.prompt: 我们的 SaaS 产品需要加一个团队协作功能，用户可以在项目里 @mention 队友然后自动发通知。这个功能优先级很高，Q2 就要上线
evals.expected_output: Structured intake brief with work type classification, entry phase, workflow recommendation, skill path, scope, and risks

evals.name: hotfix-en-casual
evals.prompt: hey so our checkout page has been throwing 500 errors since this mornings deploy, about 15% of users are affected and were losing revenue every minute. need this fixed asap
evals.expected_output: Fast-tracked intake brief identifying this as hotfix, skipping to implementation phase, with hotfix workflow and urgency-appropriate skill path

evals.name: refactor-zh-en-mixed
evals.prompt: ok 这个 auth module 我想重构一下，现在是个 2000 行的 god class，auth、session management、password reset、OAuth 全 mixed 在一起，完全没有 tests。我要 break it apart properly
evals.expected_output: Intake brief classifying as refactoring, assessing scope as medium-to-large, recommending architecture review before implementation, noting lack of tests as key risk
